title: Ep16 Who did Shinji want to see one more time
display_title: Ep16 Who did Shinji want to see one more time
wikitext:
[]: Ep.16 Who did Shinji want to see one more time? Post by GamlinKizaki » Fri May 13, 2011 10:08 pm After watching episode 16 again, I noticed that after Shinji "escapes" from the Angel and is embraced by Misato, he says the following "I just wanted to see you one more time." Was he referring to how he was glad to see his mother again in Eva 01 or was he referring to Asuka since it cuts directly to her right after saying this?

[]: Post by Leighton » Sat May 14, 2011 12:39 am I don't know if the subbing from my set of NGE episodes is bad, but he says during Misato's crying: "I just wanted to see...again" If he did say what was in your case, i'd prefer to say that he wanted to see Misato again. When the entry plug opens, Shinji looks up at Misato and see's an image/figure which VERY CLOSELY MIRRORS that frame when Shinji looked up from his pram to see Yui (during his dream in Leliel). This scene further agrees with the idea that Misato is a mother-figure for Shinji. May be someone can have a hear of the audio and post the possible english translations for us.

[]: Post by Azathoth » Sat May 14, 2011 1:08 am Japanese grammar being what it is, it's entirely possible that he never specifies what he wants to see again.

[]: Post by Sachi » Sat May 14, 2011 1:14 am He may have been referring to everybody. "I just wanted to see you [all] again."

[]: Post by Kendrix » Sat May 14, 2011 5:24 am Berote the EVA goes berserk, we see him mumbling that he doesn't want to die alone.I think he meant all of his newly-established social circle - his buddies, Misato, his father, them pretty girls...

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat May 14, 2011 10:36 am I remember somebody in an old archived ANF thread seemed to think Shinji was referring to Asuka (Not that I'd be complaining if that's the case, considering part of the reason Shinji's synch rate surpassed Asuka's to begin with was due to their kiss, with the irony of that night being Asuka's downward spiral with Shinji, Kaji and the start of her downward spiral with piloting.) , though it [s]could be[/s] probably(?) is generally referring everybody. Platinum says this: Episode 16 wrote: Misato: Shinji?! Shinji?! Shinji?! Shinji?! Are you all right, Shinji?! Shinji: I just wanted to see you one more time. Asuka: Weren't you going to scold him?

[]: Post by NemZ » Sat May 14, 2011 11:09 am Hmm... is it the same wording in Japanese as his reason for going back in EoE?

[]: Post by Seele00TextOnly » Sat May 14, 2011 11:14 am Well the answer is really quite subversive, actually. You see, it's not really Shinji that came back; Yui came back using Shinji's form. That's what is meant by 'had to come back to see them one last time'. After all, that's the kind of sentiment one has after a prolonged absence. This hybrid character is known as Shinyui. I once participated in an extensive review of a fanfic that lays all this out quite clearly. Actually, it was sort of implied he was only pretending to be Yui in that one, so maybe it's not quite so clear... nevermind.

[]: Post by NemZ » Sat May 14, 2011 11:37 am oh YOU

[]: Post by symbv » Sat May 14, 2011 12:20 pm GamlinKizaki wrote: After watching episode 16 again, I noticed that after Shinji "escapes" from the Angel and is embraced by Misato, he says the following "I just wanted to see you one more time." Was he referring to how he was glad to see his mother again in Eva 01 or was he referring to Asuka since it cuts directly to her right after saying this?

[]: Post by Xard » Sat May 14, 2011 12:23 pm Thanks for enlightening answer, symbv :)

[]: Post by Azathoth » Sat May 14, 2011 12:25 pm NemZ wrote: Hmm... is it the same wording in Japanese as his reason for going back in EoE?

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat May 14, 2011 12:25 pm NemZ wrote: Hmm... is it the same wording in Japanese as his reason for going back in EoE?

[]: Post by Azathoth » Sat May 14, 2011 12:28 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Photobucket doesn't seem to be loading images, not sure why.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat May 14, 2011 12:29 pm Yeah, it should be okay now but whatever reason it was laggy as hell at first. (Also: I was ninja'ed while typing up that reply to NemZ. )

[]: Post by symbv » Sat May 14, 2011 12:31 pm Thanks Xard :) Just one more thing. By the argument above, I would object to the Platinum translation (is it the official English subtitle?). While technically the translation was not wrong if the "you" here was interpreted as the plural "you" thus meaning all the people around him, there is a risk that this "you" could be interpreted some other way and the Japanese dialogues clearly did not have any object for Shinji's word. Instead of Shinji: I just wanted to see you one more time. I would translate it thus Shinji: Just for one more time, I wanted to see... If this does not sound natural in English then better to make it really clear in the translation Shinji: I just wanted to see all of you one more time.

[]: Post by esselfortium » Sat May 14, 2011 12:37 pm I think the English dub translated it as something along the lines of "I wanted to see them one more time," which isn't quite right (symbv's last suggestion would be ideal) but gets the idea across well enough. At least they didn't go with "y'all".

[]: Post by Azathoth » Sat May 14, 2011 12:41 pm esselfortium wrote: At least they didn't go with "y'all".

[]: Post by Kendrix » Sat May 14, 2011 1:39 pm As I say before, I'd agree with the notion that it refers to everyone/ the wish not to die all alone he expressed earlier which was what... yeah, made him come back, I think. He always comes back. He wavers, he'll try out whatever quick escape presents itself but... he always comes back, be it in the nick of time... I guess that's the difference between someone who sux and someone who just thinks he sux. Comparing it to EoE is not so far off... he ended up coming basck there, too... "I just wanted...." sound very much like justifying/explaining an action. The pilots seem to be involved in the berserking to some degree, even if the resident soul "does most of the work" in a "classic" berserk - I mean, if Yui could just go and rip open that thing all the time, she would've done so all along. Perhaps Shinji needs to... reach out to her first, allow her to take over in a way, or perhaps they need to want the same thing.

[]: Post by Tarnsman » Sat May 14, 2011 1:45 pm esselfortium wrote: I think the English dub translated it as something along the lines of "I wanted to see them one more time," which isn't quite right (symbv's last suggestion would be ideal) but gets the idea across well enough.
